posts.text:
My latest opinion piece for @MSNOWNews 

Take César Chávez’s name off everything
ms.now/news/cesar-chavez-dol…

Initial thoughts. More to come.


The Latino Newsletter (@LatNewsletter)

Our March 18 edition is by @julito77 

What the César Chávez Revelations Mean for Our Community

Michelle Zacarias and Julio will share more this Friday on the next episode of our podcast

thelatinonewsletter.org/p/ce…




— https://nitter.net/LatNewsletter/status/2034440227117252756#m

So true.


Tyler Milliken (@tylermilliken_)

Wilyer Abreu is so damn likable. Credit to him for all the work he’s done to do these interviews in English. I think 2026 is going to be a really special season for him.

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/tylermilliken_/status/2034135062950592861#m

Looks like Trump wants Venezuela to become the 51st of the Union all because of a baseball game. Will forever wonder now what he would have said if Puerto Rico were playing the US team in the WBC final. Baseball is not apolitical. It's always political.
Team USA was gifted the @WBCBaseball semifinal against Team DR last night. That was a ball.
